title: Cliently Optimized
description: Clientside Companion Pack for Serverly Optimized
body:
This is my personally preferred look and feel of Minecraft. The pack contains a variety of mods which aim to improve the usability and performance of Survival Minecraft and is meant as a client-side extension of the [Serverly Optimized]([https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-server-optimisation](https://modrinth.com/modpack/serverly-optimized)) Modpack, which enhances the server-side. Though it can also be used in Singleplayer as a standalone Modpack. The mods do not alter the behavior of the Vanilla game instead it enhance the performance and visuals while also adding a couple of quality life mods.
Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: [Vanilla Tweaks Website](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Modpack Icon: Dashboard icons created by Eucalyp - Flaticon
